3. Send the email below to 3 of your closest, trusted
colleagues:
!
I'd like your opinion on something, if you have a moment.
!I'm building a Video Sales Letter so I can sell my product more effectively online, and I wanted
to know if you could help me with one key component by giving me your insights.
!Here's my question:
!In your opinion, what problem do you think my product solves best?
!I'm trying to narrow it down a bit and I'd really appreciate your help with it. I've already got the
problem that I think it solves but I need an outside view from someone that I trust.
!Just a quick, one sentence response is enough to help out a bunch.
!Thanks in advance and I'll let you know how this new Video Sales Letter works out when I'm
finished.
!Thanks!
!!
!
